headings.usage: Used for massive tickers, panel titles, and numerical data that needs to pop.

body.usage: Dense UI data, tables, dropdowns, regular text.

monospace.usage: Data grids, order flow, code, precise numerical alignment.

rules: Tickers (NIFTY/SENSEX) MUST use tight letter spacing: tracking-tighter.
Overlines and table headers MUST be uppercase, tiny text-xs, tracking-[0.1em].
Never center align dense data arrays; always use left or tabular alignment.
NEVER use pure #000000 or generic SaaS blue gradients.
Gains and Losses must strictly use Signal Green and Electric Blaze with high contrast.
Backgrounds must be tinted gray/obsidian, avoiding muddy grays.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders (The Technical Look) - Expose the skeleton with 1px border-white/10 on panels. Flat background, no mushy shadows.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Crisp 1px border highlights, slight background lightening. Active nav items get a 2px left border (Volt Blue).
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Avoid in main data areas (causes refraction and readability issues). Use solid #141414 for high-density data.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the main background to kill digital flatness.

layouts.global_shell: 100vh h-screen w-full flex flex-col overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white

top_bar.structure: h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-4 shrink-0 bg-[#0A0A0A] z-50
top_bar.center: Prominent Stock Tickers (Nifty, BankNifty, Sensex) with large font (text-xl to text-2xl font-black Chivo) and colored % change.
top_bar.right: Global Stock/Crypto Search Bar (highly visible), Theme Toggle, Voice Command Icon, Notifications Icon.

left_sidebar.structure: w-20 md:w-64 border-r border-white/10 flex flex-col bg-[#0A0A0A] transition-all z-40
left_sidebar.active_state: Bright Volt Blue icon + text, solid background tint (bg-white/5), 2px solid Volt Blue left border.
left_sidebar.settings_drawer: Triggered by the SETTINGS nav item. Renders as a Shadcn Sheet or custom sliding drawer. MUST contain: Watchlist, Crypto List, Groww Portfolio, Portfolio Tracker, Alert System, Sector Picker, Moneycontrol Movers, Regulatory Watchdog, RL Agent Training, Ensemble Cockpit, PECE Tracker, Quant Sub-tabs. 'Dreamer V3 Robo-Trader' must be pinned at the top of this drawer with high visual prominence.

center_panel.structure: flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0 overflow-y-auto bg-[#0A0A0A]
center_panel.top: MultiChartLayout (1/2/4 grid) - takes up ~70% of vertical space. Needs tight gaps (gap-1).
center_panel.bottom: Grid for Order Flow Panel and Kronos AI Forecast - remaining ~30% of space, split horizontally.

right_panel.structure: w-80 border-l border-white/10 flex flex-col bg-[#141414] shrink-0 z-30

tabs.header: Flex row, 3 equal tabs: Signals | Positions | Risk. Active tab gets Volt Blue bottom border.
tabs.content_1_signals: Live AI signal dashboard cards. Dense, compact, text-xs/text-sm.
tabs.content_2_positions: Open positions table (Robo + Paper). Must show Live P&L prominently in Signal Green / Electric Blaze.
tabs.content_3_risk: Drawdown, Circuit-breaker, Risk metrics (Advanced Risk Panel).

mobile_responsive.sidebar: Collapses to a bottom tab bar or hidden behind a hamburger menu to maximize chart real estate.
mobile_responsive.right_panel: Hidden by default. Triggered via a Top Bar icon or swipe gesture to slide in from the right as a drawer.
mobile_responsive.center_panel: MultiChartLayout stacks vertically or defaults to 1-chart view. Order Flow and AI Forecast stack below chart.

component_mapping.StockSearch: Moved to Top Bar Right, highly accessible.
component_mapping.AutoScanner: Rendered when left nav 'SCAN' is active.
component_mapping.AI Strategy Analyzers: Bundle of 14+ rendered in center or right when left nav 'STRAT' is active. Stacked dense cards.
component_mapping.Settings Sub-modules: All grouped in Settings drawer. Use accordion or nested tabs inside the drawer.
component_mapping.Modals: Option Chain Modal, Top Options Sheet, Visualize Modal, 3D Gann Panel, etc., remain absolute/fixed position overlays with glassmorphism backdrop (backdrop-blur-md bg-black/60) and 1px border-white/10.

background_textures.category: Settings Drawer Header / Robo-Trader Banner Background

avatars.category: Top Bar User Profile (if needed) or Settings panel

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use ONLY .js files for React components, no .tsx. Assume React and Tailwind are already set up.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Create a strictly nested and responsive Flex/Grid layout representing the dashboard shell in TradingDashboard.js.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Use Shadcn components (like Tabs, Accordion, Sheet) for the Settings drawer and Right Panel.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: The Right Panel MUST be implemented using a Tab-based interface. The user explicitly chose this over a fixed list.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: DO NOT delete any existing feature component imports/placements. If it's not one of the 5 main nav items, put it in the SETTINGS drawer.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Ensure the Top Bar tickers are exceptionally bold and prominent (text-2xl or larger).
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Do not use transparent backgrounds under dropdowns or modals. Ensure z-index layers are managed carefully (e.g., top bar z-50, sidebar z-40).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use F-pattern and structural alignment.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions).
Subtle grain textures, custom cursors, and crisp 1px borders separate good from extraordinary.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Use modern button styles relevant to the tactical app style (sharp edges or minimal 4px radius).
